Title: Molecular traits of MAPK kinases and the regulatory mechanism of GhMAPKK5 alleviating drought/salt stress in cotton

Common_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: MAPK kinase (MAPKK/MKK); Pkc_MAPKK_plant_like domain; serine/threonine protein kinase with S/T-x5-S/T activation motif and D(I/L/V)K active-site motif
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Class: Amino acid; phytohormone; peptide signaling-associated metabolite network
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Proline contributes osmotic adjustment and ROS scavenging; ABA mediates abiotic stress adaptation; RALF-associated pathway participates in stress signaling
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site: Leaves/seedlings under drought and salt stress
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positive regulator of drought and salt tolerance; promotes stress-associated proline/ABA/RALF network output and ROS homeostasis
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: VIGS silencing in cotton; heterologous overexpression in Arabidopsis; RNA-seq; RT-qPCR; exogenous ABA/proline/RALF rescue assays; physiological assays; Y2H
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhMAPKK5 was the most strongly drought- and salt-induced MAPKK in Gossypium hirsutum. 2. Silencing GhMAPKK5 caused shorter roots, stronger wilting, higher MDA, and lower CAT under PEG and NaCl stress. 3. Overexpression of GhMAPKK5 in Arabidopsis improved germination, root growth, and survival under mannitol, salt, ABA, drought, and saline soil conditions. 4. Transcriptomics indicated GhMAPKK5 affects ABA signaling, proline synthesis/transport, RALF signaling, and MAPK cascade genes. 5. Exogenous ABA, proline, and RALF partially rescued stress-sensitive phenotypes of GhMAPKK5-silenced cotton.
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Broadly expressed in cotton tissues; strongly induced by drought and salt stress; expression particularly high in Tahe-2 under drought/salt
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: In cotton, induced by PEG and NaCl; in transgenic Arabidopsis, overexpression drives stress-tolerant phenotypes
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 18% PEG, 150 mM NaCl, mannitol, exogenous ABA, exogenous proline, exogenous RALF, drought in soil, saline irrigation, ABA treatment
Common_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq in cotton VIGS/control under control, drought, and salt conditions; public cotton transcriptome SRA PRJNA248163 used for expression profiling
Common_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: No obvious germination or survival penalty under normal conditions reported in Arabidopsis overexpression lines
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Promising target for engineering drought- and salt-tolerant cotton/crops; suitable for transgenic overexpression or allele selection, potentially combined with ABA/proline pathway optimization
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Although central to metabolic/stress signaling, GhMAPKK5 is a signaling kinase rather than a metabolic enzyme or TF; metabolite effects are indirect via pathway regulation
Common_Genes.Applied_Promoters: CaMV 35S constitutive promoter in Arabidopsis overexpression; pYL156 VIGS system in cotton

Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Stress signaling controlling biosynthesis/transport modules for ABA, proline, and RALF-related responses
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Activates MAPK cascade upstream of GhMAPKK5
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Likely upstream positive component of the GhMEKK3-GhMAPKK5-GhMAPK11/23 stress-response cascade
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Y2H interaction with GhMAPKK5; transcriptomic inference
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhMEKK3 physically interacted with GhMAPKK5 in Y2H. 2. It was proposed as an upstream kinase in a cotton drought/salt stress MAPK module. 3. This cascade is linked to ABA, proline, and RALF-associated stress responses.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Functional effects were inferred from cascade placement; direct metabolite measurements for GhMEKK3 alone were not performed
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Drought; salt; ROS/ABA-associated stress cues inferred
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate upstream signaling node for improving abiotic stress tolerance

Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Stress signaling controlling biosynthesis/transport modules for ABA, proline, and RALF-related responses
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Activates MAPK cascade upstream of GhMAPKK5
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Likely upstream positive component of the GhMEKK8-GhMAPKK5-GhMAPK11/23 stress-response cascade
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Y2H interaction with GhMAPKK5; transcriptomic inference
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhMEKK8 physically interacted with GhMAPKK5 in Y2H. 2. It was proposed as an upstream kinase in cotton stress signaling. 3. The cascade is associated with ABA/proline/RALF-related stress tolerance outputs.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Direct single-gene metabolic validation not shown
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential upstream engineering target for abiotic stress tolerance

Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Stress signaling controlling biosynthesis/transport modules for ABA, proline, and RALF-related responses
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Weak candidate upstream component of GhMEKK31-GhMAPKK5-GhMAPK11/23 cascade
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhMEKK31 showed weak interaction with GhMAPKK5 in Y2H. 2. It was included as a candidate upstream kinase in the stress-response MAPK cascade. 3. Its role in ABA/proline/RALF-linked responses remains inferential.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Interaction described as weak; no direct functional validation of metabolite effects
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Lower-confidence signaling target compared with GhMEKK3/8

Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Downstream stress signaling affecting transcriptional regulation of ABA/proline/RALF pathways
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: WRKY and other stress-responsive transcription factor genes inferred downstream of cascade
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Acts downstream of GhMAPKK5 in MAPK cascade
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Candidate downstream positive kinase in GhMEKK3/8/31-GhMAPKK5-GhMAPK11/23 module
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhMAPK11 physically interacted with GhMAPKK5 in Y2H. 2. It is proposed as a downstream MAPK in the cotton stress-response cascade. 3. The cascade likely regulates TFs affecting ABA, proline, and RALF pathways.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Direct metabolite or phenotype validation for GhMAPK11 alone was not performed
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate downstream kinase for stress tolerance engineering or marker development

Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Downstream stress signaling affecting transcriptional regulation of ABA/proline/RALF pathways
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: WRKY and other stress-responsive transcription factor genes inferred downstream of cascade
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Acts downstream of GhMAPKK5 in MAPK cascade
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Candidate downstream positive kinase in GhMEKK3/8/31-GhMAPKK5-GhMAPK11/23 module
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Y2H interaction with GhMAPKK5; transcriptomics noted downregulation of MAPK4-homologous Gh_D08G1467 after VIGS
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhMAPK23 physically interacted with GhMAPKK5 in Y2H. 2. Gh_D08G1467 was downregulated after GhMAPKK5 silencing. 3. GhMAPK23 is proposed as a downstream MAPK affecting stress-related regulatory outputs tied to ABA, proline, and RALF pathways.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Paper also labels Gh_D08G1467 as a MAPK4 homolog in RNA-seq discussion, indicating possible naming/homology complexity
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Downregulated after GhMAPKK5 silencing in MAPK pathway analysis
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate downstream kinase for abiotic stress improvement
